slides.title: One concrete question exposes the gap
slides.subtitle: State the task, audience, and why the answer matters.
slides.no_claims_reason: Research framing; replace with sourced specifics when factual.

visual_aid.purpose: Orient the audience before technical detail.

speaker_notes.key_message: Open with the question, failure case, or scenario that makes the paper matter.

slides.title: Current approaches miss the case that matters here

visual_aid.purpose: Make the gap visible before the method.

speaker_notes.key_message: The gap must be narrow enough to prove and important enough to care about.
talk_track: Do not list related work exhaustively.
Show the contrast that motivates the contribution.

slides.title: The contribution is three claims, each testable

visual_aid.purpose: Convert the paper into remembered claims.

speaker_notes.key_message: Keep contributions specific; avoid a long paper-outline slide.
talk_track: Name how the talk will prove it.

slides.title: The key idea changes one part of the pipeline
body: Show inputs, changed component, and outputs.
slides.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  A[Input] --> B[Baseline step]
  B --> C[New mechanism]
  C --> D[Measured output]

visual_aid.purpose: Explain the mechanism without reproducing the whole paper.

speaker_notes.key_message: The audience should understand the conceptual move before equations or implementation detail.

slides.title: The evaluation compares the method under explicit conditions

visual_aid.purpose: Prevent result claims from floating without protocol.

speaker_notes.key_message: Results are interpretable only after dataset, metric, baseline, and caveat are visible.
talk_track: Name what the evaluation does not test.

slides.title: The main result supports the claim within this scope

visual_aid.purpose: Show the finding with scope and caveat.

speaker_notes.key_message: Do not say more than the experiment proves.

slides.title: The method still has boundaries the audience should know

visual_aid.purpose: Build trust by making boundaries visible.

speaker_notes.key_message: Limitations are part of the contribution, not an apology.
talk_track: Name how future work or Q&A handles it.

slides.title: Takeaway
slides.quote: The audience should remember the gap, the key idea, and the scoped result.
slides.no_claims_reason: Closing synthesis; replace with sourced result if factual.

visual_aid.purpose: End with the remembered contribution and discussion prompt.

speaker_notes.key_message: Close with the paper's remembered contribution and invite the highest-value question.
